name: Black Seed Oil
summary: Black Seed Oil is tracked for Nigella sativa oil contains thymoquinone with antioxidant and metabolic pathway effects with conservative evidence framing. Treat dosing and outcomes as review-gated unless PMID-backed human evidence is present.
